info.title: AI Voice Audit API
info.description:
AI Voice Audit API provides a robust set of endpoints for automating the quality assurance process in call centers using advanced AI models.

## Key Features
- **Asynchronous Audio Processing**: Upload call recordings for transcription and AI-powered evaluation.
- **Dynamic LLM Selection**: Configure specific AI models per Line of Business (LOB).
- **Multi-Tenancy**: Secure data isolation and tenant-specific configurations.
- **Advanced Analytics**: Real-time dashboards and exportable reports.

## Authentication
This API uses **JWT tokens** for secure authentication. 
1. Obtain tokens via the `/api/auth/login` endpoint.
2. Include the access token in the `Authorization` header for all protected endpoints:
   `Authorization: Bearer <your_access_token>`

post.description:
Authenticate a user with email and password to obtain JWT tokens.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login"          -H "Content-Type: application/json"          -d '{"email": "admin@acme.com", "password": "SecurePass456!"}'
```

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid token

post.description:
Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/refresh"          -H "Content-Type: application/json"          -d '{"refresh_token": "eyJhbGci..."}'
```

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid token

post.description:
Invalidate the current access token by adding it to the blacklist.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/logout"          -H "Authorization: Bearer <access_token>"
```

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid token

get.description:
Retrieve a list of all registered users.

**Restriction:** Only users with the `admin` role can access this endpoint.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <access_token>" "http://localhost:5000/api/users/"
```


post.description:
Upload an audio recording to be transcribed and analyzed asynchronously by AI.

Returns a `task_id` that can be used to poll for status.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:5000/process-audio"          -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>"          -F "file=@call.wav"          -F "lob_id=1"
```

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid token

get.description:
Check the status of a background audio processing task.

Returns 'SUCCESS', 'FAILURE', or 'PROGRESS'. 
If successful, includes the evaluation result.

404.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist

post.description: Manually assign or change the Line of Business associated with an evaluation record.

404.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist

post.description:
Upload multiple audio files for parallel background processing.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:5000/process-bulk-audio"          -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>"          -F "files=@call1.wav"          -F "files=@call2.wav"          -F "lob_id=1"
```

get.description:
Export a comprehensive report containing all evaluation records and AI analysis details.

## Example curl:
```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" "http://localhost:5000/api/reports/full-report?format=xlsx" --output report.xlsx
```
